response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two main segments: opening chat (00:00-02:59) and a solo song performance (02:59-05:00). 2. Performed OCR on screen text during the song to identify the song title 'のびしろ' (Nobishiro). 3. Searched for 'のびしろ Creepy Nuts lyrics' and confirmed 'Nobishiro' is by Creepy Nuts. 4. Found and included the full lyrics for the song. 5. Constructed the JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video features VTubers Inugami Korone and Houshou Marine performing a concert, followed by a solo performance of the song 'Nobishiro' by Inugami Korone.

scenes.description: Inugami Korone and Houshou Marine are performing on stage with a puppet band. They chat between songs.
Inugami Korone performs the song 'Nobishiro'. The stage background features many screens showing clips of the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Chorus]
サボり方とか 甘え方とか 逃げ方とか 言い訳の仕方とか
やっと覚えて来た 身につけて来た 柔らかい頭
カッコのつけ方 調子のこき方 腹の据え方 良い年のこき方
脂乗りに乗った 濁った目した だらしない身体
嫌われ方や 慕われ方や 叱り方とか 綺麗なぶつかり方
もっと覚えたい事が 山のようにある… のびしろしか無いわ
のびしろしか無いわ のびしろしか無いわ のびしろしか無いわ
俺らまだ のびしろしか無いわ

[Verse 1]
悪者扱いして来た街で
悪者扱いして来たオトナへ
変わりゆく俺、鏡の中へ
尋ねても答えなら yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah
去る者追わない 引くとこ引いて
丸く収めたり 軽くいなして
鏡の中でわろてるお前
括れやしなかったわ。たったの三文字で
日々重くなる足取りで
自分の歩幅で闊歩してる
カマすとこカマす
まかすとこまかす
割と適当な段取りで
やっと分かって来たかも
このポンコツの操縦の仕方を
19の時の「ついに来たか…」より
もっと清々しい気持ち
隅田川にかかる
勝鬨橋を渡る
左手にスカイツリー
右手に東京タワー
俺はその真ん中

[Chorus]
サボり方とか 甘え方とか 逃げ方とか 言い訳の仕方とか
やっと覚えて来た 身につけて来た 柔らかい頭
カッコのつけ方 調子のこき方 腹の据え方 良い年のこき方
脂乗りに乗った 濁った目した だらしない身体

[Verse 2]
幸せの体感速度は 早くなるばかり
傷が癒えていく速度は 遅くなるばかり
他人に期待をしないのが 今の俺の強み
手負いでも進める距離なら 行くぜ騙し騙し
身の程を知るほどに
胸を張りいつも通り
でも時にしたって良い背伸び
やっと「大人げない」が出来る年
小さな枠組み ただの数字
縛られずにでも腹くくり
あの日の俺が立ち止まる
ほどにデカくそびえ立つ
隅田川にかかる
勝鬨橋を渡る
重なるスカイツリー
東京タワーと真ん中の頼りない背中

[Chorus]
サボり方とか 甘え方とか 逃げ方とか 言い訳の仕方とか
やっと覚えて来た 身につけて来た 柔らかい頭
カッコのつけ方 調子のこき方 腹の据え方 良い年のこき方
脂乗りに乗った 濁った目した だらしない身体
嫌われ方や 慕われ方や 叱り方とか 綺麗なぶつかり方
もっと覚えたい事が 山のようにある… のびしろしか無いわ
のびしろしか無いわ のびしろしか無いわ のびしろしか無いわ
俺らまだ のびしろしか無いわ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Chorus]
How to loaf, how to be spoiled, how to run away, how to make excuses,
Finally, I've learned them, my soft head, I've gotten them into my body.
How to act cool, how to show off, how to hold my ground, how to act my age,
Greasy, dull-eyed, slovenly body.
How to be hated, how to be admired, how to scold, how to clash beautifully,
There are still mountains of things I want to learn... I have nothing but potential.
I have nothing but potential, I have nothing but potential, I have nothing but potential,
We still have nothing but potential.

[Verse 1]
In this city that has always treated me like a villain,
To the adults who have always treated me like a villain,
I change into the me inside the mirror,
Even if I ask, the answer is yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah.
I don't chase those who leave, I pull back when I should pull back,
Wrapping things up smoothly, letting them slide easily,
The you laughing in the mirror,
I couldn't summarize it in just three characters.
With steps that get heavier day by day,
I am walking with my own stride.
I do what I need to do,
I let slide what I need to let slide,
With a relatively loose plan,
Maybe I've finally understood,
How to operate this piece of junk.
Compared to the 'It's finally here...' when I was 19,
My feelings are much more refreshing.
Crossing the Kachidoki Bridge over the Sumida River,
With the Skytree on my left,
And the Tokyo Tower on my right,
I am right in the middle.

[Chorus]
How to loaf, how to be spoiled, how to run away, how to make excuses,
Finally, I've learned them, my soft head, I've gotten them into my body.
How to act cool, how to show off, how to hold my ground, how to act my age,
Greasy, dull-eyed, slovenly body.

[Verse 2]
The speed of experiencing happiness only gets faster,
The speed at which wounds heal only gets slower,
Not expecting anything from others is my current strength,
I'll go the distance I can even if I'm wounded, bluffing, bluffing,
As I know my own limits,
I puff out my chest and stay the same,
But sometimes it's okay to stretch,
It's finally the age where I can be 'immature',
Small frameworks are just numbers,
Without being tied down, I gird my loins,
To the extent that the me of that day stands still,
It towers large.
Crossing the Kachidoki Bridge over the Sumida River,
With the overlapping Skytree,
And the Tokyo Tower, and my unreliable back in the middle.

[Chorus]
How to loaf, how to be spoiled, how to run away, how to make excuses,
Finally, I've learned them, my soft head, I've gotten them into my body.
How to act cool, how to show off, how to hold my ground, how to act my age,
Greasy, dull-eyed, slovenly body.
How to be hated, how to be admired, how to scold, how to clash beautifully,
There are still mountains of things I want to learn... I have nothing but potential.
I have nothing but potential, I have nothing but potential, I have nothing but potential,
We still have nothing but potential.,reference_lyrics_og:
